title: QUIC RFC 9000 Non-Ack-Eliciting ACK Deferral And Inclusion Verification
verification_method: Requirement-home execution, deterministic fuzz/property sampling, reciprocal trace inspection, and SpecTrace render/check for the bounded non-ack-eliciting ACK deferral and inclusion proof.
scope: This verification covers the supported ACK-generation behavior for processed Application Data packet numbers: non-ack-eliciting-only receipts do not independently request ACK emission, and retained non-ack-eliciting packet numbers are included in ACK ranges when a later ack-eliciting event causes ACK frame construction.
expected_result: Focused tests prove non-ack-only scheduling deferral, delayed behavior after max_ack_delay, retained non-ack packet inclusion in contiguous ACK ranges, retained inclusion across gaps, and deterministic fuzz/property samples for both surfaces. No parser, serializer, wire-format, hot-path production, loss-recovery, congestion-control, packet-builder, or public API behavior is introduced by this proof slice.
procedure: Run the focused RFC 9000 requirement-home tests for S13P2P1-0008 and S13P2P1-0011.
Render and check the touched SpecTrace artifacts.
Confirm the focused artifact set is reciprocal only for the intended S13P2P1 non-ack-eliciting ACK deferral and inclusion requirements.
Confirm that no ACK serialization, packet builder selection, peer recovery, congestion response, public API, or interop claim is introduced.
preconditions: Packet processing has already recovered packet numbers for the Application Data packet number space.
Packet processing has already classified whether each processed packet is ack-eliciting.
Actual packet construction and transmission policy remain outside this ACK-generation proof slice.

supplemental_sections.heading: No Production Hot Path Change
supplemental_sections.content: This slice adds focused trace and requirement-home proof for existing ACK-generation behavior. It does not alter parser, serializer, wire-format, state-machine, or hot-path production code; deterministic fuzz/property coverage exercises retained range and scheduling classification without requiring a benchmark refresh.

status_summary: Passed locally on 2026-04-25. Focused non-ack-eliciting ACK deferral and inclusion requirement-home tests passed, including deterministic fuzz/property coverage, and the focused reciprocal trace check linked only S13P2P1-0008 and S13P2P1-0011 to the new artifact set.
